How KILN works

From template to deployed SaaS in minutes

KILN handles the infrastructure. You handle the product. Pick a template, inject your keys, fire — and your SaaS is live on Fly.io.

Start buildingRead the docs

Four steps to production

01

Pick your template

Choose from battle-tested SaaS starters — fully wired with auth, billing, emails, and a database. Each template is production-ready from day one.

Starter · Pro · API-only ·更多 coming soon
02

Configure your keys

Connect your own API keys and credentials. Add your OpenAI key, database connection, Resend for email, and your Fly.io token so KILN can deploy on your behalf.

OpenAI · Database · Fly.io · Resend
03

Fire

Hit the button. KILN orchestrates the deployment — spinning up a dedicated Fly.io app, injecting your secrets, and launching your SaaS in minutes.

~3–5 minute average deploy time
04

Your SaaS, live

Your app goes live at yourname.fly.dev. You get the URL, credentials, and a dashboard to manage it. No infrastructure to maintain. No servers to babysit.

https://your-app.fly.dev

The full flow

Pick Template
→
Configure Keys
→
KILN → Fly.io API
→
App Created
→
Secrets Injected
→
Docker Build
→
Deployed

Everything after "Configure Keys" happens automatically. KILN talks to Fly.io's API, provisions your VM, builds your Docker image, and deploys — no human in the loop.

FAQ

Who owns the deployed app?

You do. KILN orchestrates the deployment to Fly.io under your configured token. Your app, your Fly.io org, your infrastructure.

What does it cost?

KILN's subscription covers the orchestration. Your Fly.io usage is billed directly by Fly.io — shared-cpu VMs start at ~$1.86/mo. You only pay for what you use.

Can I use my own Fly.io account?

Yes. During configuration, you provide your own Fly.io API token. KILN creates the app under your org — we never store your token after the deploy.

What templates are available?

Currently: SaaS Starter (Next.js + Better Auth + Polar billing + Resend emails). API-only and more templates are in the works.

How does billing work?

You subscribe to KILN via Polar.sh. Your subscription unlocks deployment credits. Each fire consumes credits based on the template.

Ready to fire?

Deploy your first SaaS in minutes. No credit card required to start.

Start for free →
